summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Wishlist functionality and AI Recommendations for Product Sourcing. Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI flows verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/wishlist requires authentication (401)
Backend: POST /api/wishlist/add requires authentication (401)
Backend: DELETE /api/wishlist/{product_id} requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/wishlist/check/{product_id} returns false without auth
Backend: GET /api/wishlist returns items and count
Backend: POST /api/wishlist/add adds product to wishlist
Backend: Wishlist verification via GET and /check endpoint
Backend: Wishlist returns full product details (name, price, slug)
Backend: Adding non-existent product returns 404
Backend: Duplicate add is idempotent (no duplicate entries)
Backend: DELETE /api/wishlist/{product_id} removes product
Backend: POST /api/wishlist/move-to-cart/{product_id} workflow
Backend: GET /api/admin/sourcing/ai-recommendations requires admin auth
Backend: AI Recommendations returns recommendations array
Backend: AI Recommendation structure validated (type, reason, suggested_search)
Backend: AI Recommendations includes insights with suggestion
Backend: AI Recommendations includes known types (similar_to_bestseller, trending, seasonal, gap_fill)
Backend: Full wishlist workflow integration test
Frontend: Homepage loads correctly
Frontend: Wishlist icon hidden for non-logged users
Frontend: Wishlist icon visible in navbar after login with badge count
Frontend: Product detail page has wishlist heart button
Frontend: Wishlist toggle (add/remove) works via heart button
Frontend: Toast notifications for add/remove wishlist actions
Frontend: Wishlist page at /wishlist loads correctly
Frontend: Wishlist page shows 'My Wishlist' title
Frontend: Continue Shopping button present
Frontend: Wishlist items display with Move to Cart and Delete buttons
Frontend: Empty wishlist state shows Browse Products button
Frontend: Move to Cart moves product from wishlist to cart
Frontend: Admin Product Sourcing page loads at /admin/sourcing
Frontend: AI Product Recommendations section visible
Frontend: 6 AI recommendation cards displayed
Frontend: Click AI recommendation populates search input
Frontend: AI insights message displayed
critical_code_review_comments: AI Recommendations use rule-based logic (not external AI API call) - documented as expected per requirements
Wishlist operations use real MongoDB storage
Move-to-cart endpoint requires cart_session_id as query parameter
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - used existing products
context_for_next_testing_agent: Wishlist feature fully functional at /wishlist route. API endpoints: GET /api/wishlist, POST /api/wishlist/add, DELETE /api/wishlist/{product_id}, GET /api/wishlist/check/{product_id}, POST /api/wishlist/move-to-cart/{product_id}. AI Recommendations at GET /api/admin/sourcing/ai-recommendations returns 6 recommendations with types: similar_to_bestseller, trending, seasonal, gap_fill. Frontend shows heart icon in product detail page and navbar. Admin credentials: admin@calmtails.com / admin123

mocked_apis.AI Recommendations: Rule-based (not external AI) - analyzes top-selling products and provides search suggestions

endpoints: GET /api/wishlist - Get user wishlist with product details
GET /api/wishlist/check/{product_id} - Check if product in wishlist
ui_elements: Heart button on product detail page
